title: BINI Makes History at Coachella
description: BINI took the Coachella stage, marking a historic international milestone for the group and P-pop.

title: Coachella Weekend Two
description: BINI returned to the Coachella stage for their second festival performance.

title: Sheena Catacutan's Birthday
description: Celebrating the birthday of BINI's main dancer, Sheena Catacutan.

title: BINI Official Debut
description: BINI officially debuted with Born to Win.

title: BINIverse: The First Solo Concert
description: BINI began their first solo concert run at the New Frontier Theater.

title: BINI at KCON Los Angeles
description: BINI performed during the KCON Los Angeles pre-show at Crypto.com Arena.

title: ASAP Natin 'To California
description: BINI performed at Toyota Arena in Ontario, California.

title: Born to Win Album
description: BINI released their debut studio album Born to Win.

title: Grand BINIverse Begins
description: The Grand BINIverse concert run began at the Smart Araneta Coliseum.
